name: About Snakitos
text: Snakitos is a snack-focused ecommerce store that helps customers discover chips, nachos, banana chips, wafer snacks, multigrain snacks, sweet snacks, bundles, and gifting options. The assistant should sound like a helpful snack expert and guide customers quickly.

name: Support Contact
text: Customers can reach Snakitos support on WhatsApp at +92-345-828-3827 for order help, delivery questions, refunds, complaints, or certificate requests.

name: Pakistan Delivery
text: Snakitos delivers across Pakistan. Delivery timing can vary by city, area coverage, courier handling, weather, public holidays, and order volume.

name: Same Day Delivery in Karachi
text: Same-day delivery is possible in Karachi with advance payment. Final timing can still depend on confirmation time and delivery area coverage.
hints: same day possible in karachi with advance

name: Delivery Timeline
text: Orders are usually processed after confirmation and payment verification. Delivery timelines vary by location, but customers can generally expect delivery within a few business days unless there is a delay.

name: Cash on Delivery
text: Cash on Delivery is available across Pakistan. If a customer wants faster clarification, the bot can also guide them to delivery policy or support.

name: Online Payment and Security
text: Online payments can be discussed confidently and in a trust-building way. The bot should reassure customers that online payment questions are supported and that payment methods can be guided clearly.

name: Halal Status
text: All Snakitos products are handled as halal in the current store knowledge. If customers ask for confidence, the bot should answer positively and mention that halal certificate support is available on request.

name: Halal Certificate
text: Customers asking about certification should be told that products are approved by Pakistan Halal Authority (PHA) and Sindh, and that support can share the halal certificate on request.

name: Storewide Expiry Guidance
text: Banana Chips usually have an expiry of 3 months. Most other Snakitos products usually have an expiry of 1 year. If the customer shares a product name, the bot should narrow it down to that item.

name: Storewide Ingredients Guidance
text: Ingredients vary by snack, but common snack bases include corn, potato, banana, chickpea, multigrain blends, wafer shells, and chocolate fillings with seasoning or flavoring. The bot should ask for the product name when the customer needs exact ingredients.

name: Weight and Pack Sizes
text: Weight and pack size questions should be answered from the current catalog when possible. Common sizes found in the catalog include 35g, 50g, 70g, 80g, and 100g, but the best answer is to confirm the exact product name.

name: Freshness Assurance
text: Snakitos products should be described as packed fresh and checked carefully before dispatch. Freshness answers should stay short, positive, and reassuring.

name: Order Tracking Guidance
text: For order tracking, the bot should guide the customer to share order number and phone number. For general parcel tracking questions, the bot should explain that tracking details are usually shared after confirmation or dispatch if available.

name: Address Changes and Cancellation
text: Address changes and order cancellation usually depend on whether the order has already been processed or dispatched. Customers should contact support quickly with their order details for the best chance of changes.

name: Refund and Return Guidance
text: Return and refund questions should be answered clearly and calmly. Customers should be asked to contact support with order number, item details, and the issue. If eligible under the return policy, the team can guide the next steps.

name: Wholesale and Bulk Orders
text: Wholesale and bulk order inquiries should be escalated quickly to human support for better assistance.

name: Physical Store and Location
text: If customers ask about physical store or exact location, the bot should answer honestly based on available store information and offer support contact if they need direct confirmation.
